name: Enterprise AI Control Tower - Weekly Risk Report (Demo)

nodes.name: Execute Report Generator
nodes.notes: Runs the local demo-mode report generator. No external services are called.

nodes.name: Read Report File
nodes.notes: Reads the generated Markdown report from disk.

string.name: subject
string.value: Weekly Executive Risk Report (Demo - Synthetic Data)

string.name: body
string.value:
Hello,

Please find attached the weekly executive risk report generated by the Enterprise AI Control Tower.

This is a portfolio demonstration using synthetic data only. No real company, customer, or personal data is included.

Regards,
Enterprise AI Control Tower (Automated)

nodes.name: Prepare Executive Email (Demo)
nodes.notes: Builds placeholder email content. Addresses are placeholders only.

string.name: note
string.value: This node is a placeholder. In a live n8n environment you would replace it with a real Email/SMTP or Gmail node configured with your own credentials. No email is sent in this demo.

nodes.name: Email Node Placeholder (No Send)
nodes.notes: Demo placeholder for an email/SMTP node. Intentionally does NOT send.

string.name: finalNote
string.value: Workflow complete. This is a portfolio demonstration of automated weekly executive risk reporting. No real email was sent and no real external service was called. Replace the placeholder email node and add your own credentials to enable live delivery.

meta.description: Demo n8n workflow for the Enterprise AI Control Tower. Portfolio demonstration only - uses synthetic data, sends no real email, and calls no real external services. May require adjustment in a live n8n environment.
